title: image1 into image2
prompt: 4-second cinematic observational shot. Start fully in the world of image1.jpg inside a quiet computer lab or studio, grounded realistic lighting, first-person or subtle handheld observer perspective. Hold clear continuity on the rowed iMac computers, their spacing and screen angles, the blackboard with handwritten notes, and the ceiling light fixtures. The camera makes a slow natural lateral drift and slight forward move, as if walking past the workstation area toward the windows. Keep the room alive with tiny believable motion: faint screen glow variation, subtle exposure breathing, soft reflections on glass, barely perceptible ambient vibration. As the camera approaches the rectangular windows, let the exterior become more prominent without any surreal change: black and gray building facades remain consistent, some windows lit, and the wet alleyway surface catching dim reflections. The interior recedes naturally while the exterior view takes over, using the window frame and reflections as the bridge. End fully established in image2.jpg with the alleyway outside dominant, subdued evening atmosphere, stable framing that can hand off smoothly to the next shot.

title: image2 into Image3

title: Image3 into Image4
prompt: 6-second cinematic observational shot. Start fully in Image3.jpeg, calm contemplative view through a window with visible frame and glass texture, looking toward a ferry boat with life rings and realistic wake patterns on the water. The camera begins with a steady observational hold, then slowly tracks or pans so the ferry's lateral movement and the water ripples create directional momentum. Keep the scene physically believable: gentle vibration from transport, soft reflections on the glass, water texture moving continuously, ferry details remaining consistent. Use this motion to bridge into the city traffic environment in a grounded way, as if the camera is continuing past the window and arriving at an elevated urban overlook. The horizontal flow of the ferry wake evolves into the movement of many lanes of traffic. Preserve continuity through repeated linear patterns and motion direction. Distinctive tall buildings become clear, including cylindrical and glass skyscrapers, with overpasses and green freeway directional signs entering the frame naturally. Daylight urban atmosphere grows brighter and busier while remaining realistic and cohesive. End fully established in Image4.jpeg with multilane traffic, consistent vehicle types and positions, stable urban composition, and a smooth settled frame ready for continuation.
